name: Viennese Nut Squares
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
4 Egg yolks, separated from 4 egg whites
1/2 lb Chopped pecans
1 cup Granulated sugar
Cut butter into flour until the mixture resembles small peas. Beat eggs and add with sugar, lemon juice, and peel. Save out 1 cup of this dough. Roll out remaining dough to fit a greased 9x13-inch pan.
Spread the dough with apricot preserves. Chill while preparing filling.
Filling: Mix egg yolks with granulated sugar; add nuts. Beat egg whites until stiff. Carefully fold in nut mixture. Spread over apricots. Roll out saved dough. Cut into 1-inch strips to form a diagonal lattice on top of filling. Bake at 350°F for 60-75 minutes until golden.
